name: xray-manager
description: This module is used to get and push cucumber tests into jira (Xray)

scripts.xc:test-features: npm run xc:clean:reports:features; ../gradlew -p ../ clean test -x xcGetFeatures -x xcBuildReport || true
scripts.xc:all: npm run xc:get-features; npm run xc:test-features; npm run xc:build-report; npm run xc:send-report
